name: Sant'Emiliano Classico
descShort: Smooth and buttery with notes of fresh-cut grass, sweet almond, and a gentle peppery finish. Our everyday essential.
descLong: Hand-harvested Moraiolo, Frantoio, and Leccino from our family grove in the Trevi valley. Buttery and smooth, with notes of fresh grass, sweet almond, and a gentle peppery finish — our everyday essential.

highlights.label: Aroma
highlights.title: Fresh Grass & Almond
highlights.text: Clean, inviting scent of freshly cut grass with a warm undertone of sweet almond.

highlights.label: Palate
highlights.title: Buttery & Smooth
highlights.text: A soft, round texture with a clean buttery quality that coats the palate gently.

highlights.label: Finish
highlights.title: Gentle Pepper
highlights.text: A subtle, pleasing warmth at the back of the throat — the hallmark of a quality extra virgin.

name: Sant'Emiliano Fresco
descShort: Intensely green and peppery — harvested early for maximum polyphenols. Bold, vivid, and alive.
descLong: Pressed from olives harvested at the very start of the season before full ripeness, Fresco captures the oil at its most vibrant. Intensely green with a sharp peppery finish and high polyphenol content — the choice for drizzling raw over soups, bruschetta, and carpaccio.

highlights.label: Aroma
highlights.title: Freshly Cut Herbs
highlights.text: A vivid, green-forward scent with hints of artichoke and fresh tomato leaf.

highlights.label: Palate
highlights.title: Bold & Vivid
highlights.text: Full-bodied with a pronounced bitterness — a sign of high polyphenol content.

highlights.label: Finish
highlights.title: Sharp Pepper
highlights.text: A strong peppery kick that lingers — the signature of a true early harvest oil.

name: Sant'Emiliano Delicato
descShort: Mild and golden — gentle on the palate with floral notes and a sweet finish. Perfect for delicate dishes.
descLong: Pressed from late-harvest Leccino olives, Delicato is our most approachable oil. Pale golden in colour with a light, floral character and a sweet, almost buttery finish with no bitterness. Ideal for light fish, steamed vegetables, and desserts.

highlights.label: Aroma
highlights.title: Floral & Golden
highlights.text: Delicate scent of ripe fruit, wildflowers, and a hint of almond.

highlights.label: Palate
highlights.title: Soft & Sweet
highlights.text: Light-bodied with a smooth, almost sweet quality — zero bitterness.

highlights.label: Finish
highlights.title: Clean & Lingering
highlights.text: A clean, barely-there warmth that fades gently without sharpness.

name: Sant'Emiliano Intenso
descShort: Rich and robust — a powerful oil with deep olive character. For those who want flavour they can feel.
descLong: Made exclusively from Moraiolo olives at peak ripeness, Intenso is our most powerful expression. Dark green, dense, and richly aromatic — with a deep olive bitterness and a long, warm finish. The oil of choice for grilled meats, legumes, and aged cheeses.

highlights.label: Aroma
highlights.title: Deep & Earthy
highlights.text: Rich scent of ripe olive, dried herbs, and a touch of dark leafy greens.

highlights.label: Palate
highlights.title: Bold & Robust
highlights.text: Full, dense body with a pronounced bitterness and powerful olive character.

highlights.label: Finish
highlights.title: Long & Warm
highlights.text: A sustained, warming finish that coats the throat — intense and memorable.
